about.metaDescription: All One Rengøring is a registered Danish cleaning company (CVR 40559736) delivering professional cleaning for homes and businesses across Zealand.
about.heading: Cleaning you can count on
paragraphs: All One Rengøring is a Danish cleaning company based in Copenhagen. We clean private homes and businesses across Zealand – with the same care as if it were our own.

Behind the name are people who take pride in their craft: we arrive on time, keep our word, and only leave when the result is something we would come home to ourselves. A clear agreement, a transparent price – and a daily life that is just a little easier for you.

values.title: Thoroughness
values.description: We care about the details – they are the difference between clean and truly clean.

values.title: Reliability
values.description: We arrive on time and keep what we agree.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: Clear communication, transparent prices and respect for your home or workplace.

cta.heading: Shall we talk about your task?
cta.text: Call us, or get a free quote via the form.

about.imageAlt: A cleaner wiping a surface in a bright home

heroImage.alt: A cleaner wiping a surface in a bright home

blockImages.alt: Thorough wiping of surfaces in a home

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body:
All One Rengøring
Frederikssundsvej 384, 1th
CVR no. 40559736
Phone: +45 28 76 31 86

sections.heading: What information we process
sections.body: When you fill in our quote form, we process the information you provide: name, phone number, email, city, chosen service, company name if applicable, and your description of the task.

sections.heading: Purpose and legal basis
sections.body: The information is used solely to answer your enquiry and prepare your quote. Processing is based on your request prior to a potential agreement (GDPR art. 6(1)(b)) and our legitimate interest in answering enquiries (art. 6(1)(f)).

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: We keep your enquiry for as long as necessary to handle it and any subsequent agreement. [BEKRÆFT: konkret opbevaringsperiode]

sections.heading: Sharing of information
sections.body: We do not share your information with third parties for marketing. Enquiries are delivered via our email provider, which processes data on our behalf.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: This website uses no marketing or analytics cookies. Only one technically necessary cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) is used to remember your language choice.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase and restrict the processing of your data, and the right to complain to the Danish Data Protection Agency (datatilsynet.dk). Contact us by phone to exercise your rights.

sections.heading: The company
sections.body:
All One Rengøring
Frederikssundsvej 384, 1th
CVR no. 40559736
Phone: +45 28 76 31 86

sections.heading: Services
sections.body: We provide cleaning services for homes and businesses in Zealand, including recurring cleaning, deep cleaning, move-out cleaning and commercial cleaning.

sections.heading: Quotes and agreement
sections.body: All quotes are free and non-binding. An agreement is only concluded once both parties have confirmed the content, price and time of the quote.

sections.heading: Prices and payment
sections.body: The price is stated in the specific quote and includes VAT unless otherwise indicated. Payment terms are agreed in connection with the quote. [BEKRÆFT: standardbetalingsvilkår]

sections.heading: Cancellation and changes
sections.body: Cancellation or rescheduling of an agreed cleaning must take place within reasonable time in advance. [BEKRÆFT: konkret aflysningsfrist]

sections.heading: Liability and complaints
sections.body: If you are not satisfied with a completed cleaning, contact us as soon as possible so we can make it right. [BEKRÆFT: forsikrings- og reklamationsvilkår]

sections.heading: Right of complaint
sections.body: As a consumer you may complain to the Danish Centre for Complaint Resolution via naevneneshus.dk if we cannot find a solution together.

serviceDetail.priceIntro: We give a fixed price based on your actual task – not a standard rate.
serviceDetail.ctaText: Describe the task and we will come back with a no-obligation quote.

faqPage.metaDescription: Answers to the most common cleaning questions: price, lock-in, insurance, cleaning products, regular staff and service area.
faqPage.heading: Questions and answers
faqPage.intro: The questions we get most often – answered honestly. If yours is not here, give us a call.
faqPage.helpText: Call us – we are happy to answer everything, also before you decide.

items.question: What does cleaning cost with you?
items.answer: We work with fixed prices rather than standard rates: the price depends on the size of the home or premises, the scope of the task and how often we come. You always get a free, no-obligation quote before deciding.

items.question: Is the quote binding?
items.answer: No. The quote is free and entirely non-binding. You decide whether to proceed.

items.question: Is there a lock-in on a recurring agreement?
items.answer: No. You can change or cancel the agreement. We would rather keep customers who stay because they are happy.

items.question: Can I use the Danish service deduction?
items.answer: Yes. As a private customer you can use the servicefradrag and deduct part of the labour cost from your taxes. Rates change yearly – see the current ones at skat.dk.

items.question: Do you bring equipment and cleaning products?
items.answer: Yes. We arrive with professional equipment and cleaning products – you need to provide nothing.

items.question: Do I need to be home while you clean?
items.answer: That is up to you. Many customers give us access while they are at work, so the home is clean when they return.

items.question: Do I get the same staff every time?
items.answer: We aim to send the same regular staff. That gives consistent quality – and you never have to explain things twice.

items.question: How quickly can you start?
items.answer: Send us the task and we will tell you honestly when we can be ready. We do not promise a date we cannot keep.

items.question: Is your work insured?
items.answer: Yes. Both our staff and your property are covered, so you can feel secure while we work in your home or premises.

items.question: What if I am not satisfied?
items.answer: Contact us as soon as possible and we will put it right. We would rather redo the work than have an unhappy customer.

items.question: How do you handle keys and access?
items.answer: Keys are stored without a name or address, and access arrangements are agreed with you in writing before we start.

items.question: Which areas do you cover?
items.answer: We cover all of Zealand – from Copenhagen and Greater Copenhagen to North Zealand, Roskilde, Køge, Næstved and the rest of the island.

items.question: Does it cost extra if I live far away?
items.answer: Your address in Zealand is not an obstacle. If anything affects the price, we say so in the quote – not afterwards.

areas.metaDescription: All One Rengøring covers all of Zealand: Copenhagen, Greater Copenhagen, North Zealand and the rest of the island. Free quotes.
areas.heading: We cover all of Zealand
areas.intro: Your address is not the deciding factor. We clean for private customers and businesses across the island – from the city districts to West Zealand.
areas.note: Live somewhere not on the list? Call us – we cover all of Zealand and almost always find a solution.

cta.heading: We come to you too
cta.text: Tell us where and what – and get a free quote.
